name: EPIC Golf Center (Golf Academy)
about: Epic Golf Center is a 7,400 sq. ft. indoor golf training facility featuring state-of-the-art simulators and practice areas. It is equipped with Trackman 4 technology, seven Uneekor EYE XO hitting bays, and a 1,400 sq. ft. indoor chipping/putting green with a genuine greenside bunker. The venue offers various game modes, including driving range, target practice, and access to hundreds of real-life courses. Lessons are available for all skill levels, with options for adults, juniors, and on-course field sessions. Membership packages and bookings can be made through their website.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman 4 and Uneekor EYE XO simulator technology
Year-round indoor training with real-time data and analysis
Comprehensive facility including a bunker-equipped chipping green
Flexible lesson programs for all ages and skill levels
Access to hundreds of world-famous golf courses

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor for real-time data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not explicitly mention club rentals, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No food or drink service is mentioned, but it is not explicitly prohibited.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify an estimated time for 18 holes, as it depends on the simulator game mode and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Epic Golf Center offers junior lessons, after-school programs, and seasonal golf camps for youth.
